String: While under the effect of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Ice III<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> and 3 <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Hearts<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, swapping to <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Astral Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> will allow you to execute <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Paradox<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

While under the effect of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Astral Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> or when possessing maximum stacks of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Ice<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> and <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Hearts<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, swapping to the opposite element will allow you to execute <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Paradox<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

Viper engages enemies mainly through the use of three-step combos, their primary combos beginning with either <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Steel Fangs<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> or <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Dread Fangs<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>. The third step can end with one of several weaponskills, each of which grants an effect to strengthen a different combo-ending action. To reach these actions will require the use of specific combo routes.
The glow of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Vipersight<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>'s blades correspond with the outlining of hotbar icons to indicate the next step in a combo. Following these indicators will help ensure the use of combos that finish with a strengthened attack.

The third step can end with one of several weaponskills, each of which grants an effect to strengthen a different combo-ending action. To reach these actions will require the use of specific combo routes.

Following these indicators will help ensure the use of combos that finish with a strengthened attack.
